response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the entire video for vocal music content. 2. Determined that the audio consists exclusively of the streamer's commentary and ambient game music, which is instrumental. 3. Defined the video into seven logical scenes based on the gameplay tasks performed. 4. Verified the absence of any vocal songs in every scene; thus, no lyric searches were performed, and all music metadata fields are set to null.
response.global_summary: The video features Ninomae Ina'nis playing Minecraft, focusing on farming activities, managing a chicken coop, checking honey production, and harvesting crops. The audio consists of the streamer's spoken narration and ambient Minecraft background music, with no vocal songs present.

scenes.description: The video begins with the player wandering around their Minecraft base, checking chests, and narrating their actions.
The player focuses on managing a chicken coop, trying to gather eggs while ensuring the chickens do not escape.
The player checks on the honey production and bees.
The player harvests and replants wheat on the farm.
The player continues farming tasks, planting crops and organizing inventory.
The player harvests pumpkins from their farm.
The player performs a final check on the chicken coop before concluding the segment.
